response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the entire video to analyze audio content. 2. Confirmed the audio consists exclusively of the streamer's commentary and in-game Minecraft sound effects. 3. response.global_summary: A continuous video of a VTuber playing Minecraft while engaging in casual conversation about her anime watch list and humorous observations regarding her handle and the color green. There is no vocal music in this video.
